description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular, slim profile and rounded corners. The front features a large, glossy touchscreen display with a single circular home button at the bottom and a speaker grille at the top. The back is matte black with a single camera lens and flash located in the top left corner. The sides are flat and house several small physical buttons, likely for volume and power control. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a seamless, minimalist design. Its compact size and familiar interface suggest it is designed for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large touchscreen, single rear camera, and minimal physical buttons. The design is modern and compact, suitable for handheld use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with app icons, a circular home button, and a speaker grille at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the flat edges, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a matte black surface with a single camera lens and flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the flat edge and small physical buttons, likely for volume and power.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical smartphone home screen with app icons arranged in a grid, a digital clock at the top, and a calendar widget showing the date. The icons include Messages, Calendar, Photos, Camera, Maps, Weather, Notes, Reminders, Clock, Stocks, iTunes, App Store, Game Center, Settings, Phone, Mail, Safari, and Music.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens and flash are located in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: One circular home button is centered below the screen on the front. The left edge has two small buttons, likely for volume control, and a third smaller button, likely a mute switch. The right edge appears to have a single button, likely the power button.
